title: Astel Provenance Channel Descriptor
description: The provenance channel: one scalar per primitive, present from L0 to export, encoding how measured-vs-generated each primitive is. 1.0 = fully measured (real sensor data), 0.0 = fully generated (hallucinated by a prior with no direct observation); intermediate values are partially constrained. This is the substrate of the Truth Meter (CLAUDE.md section 8.4) and the section 10.4 no-silent-hallucination guarantee (DECISIONS.md binding architecture decision 1). Generative completion may only lower-bound provenance for regions it touches; it MUST NOT raise the provenance of a region with measured evidence. See manifest-v0.md section 5.

semantic.description: Identifier of the channel semantic. Fixed for v0.

range.description: Value range after decoding. Fixed [0,1] for v0.

convention.description: Human-readable statement of the direction of the scalar.

precision.description: Storage precision of the encoded scalar. 'u8' = UNORM8 (1 byte, q=round(p*255), p=q/255), the default 256-level confidence; 'u16' = UNORM16 (q=round(p*65535), p=q/65535) for cases where the hallucination heatmap drives print/physics safety decisions.

channels.description: One descriptor per layer that carries a provenance buffer (typically L0-L3). Each binds a layer to an accessor in the manifest buffer table. The accessor is SCALAR, UNORM8 or UNORM16 per 'precision', tightly packed, count = the layer's primitive count, index-aligned to that layer.

layer.description: Layer id this provenance buffer is bound to.

accessor.description: Index into the manifest buffer table's accessors array holding the per-primitive provenance scalar.

count.description: Number of primitives, equal to the bound layer's count.

export_carriers.description: How provenance survives export to formats that do not natively define it. Index alignment to the exported splat order is mandatory; any splat reordering on export (e.g. SPZ Morton sort) MUST apply the same permutation to the provenance accessor.

gltf_attribute.description: Custom glTF vertex attribute carrying provenance on the splat primitive. Underscore-prefixed per glTF custom-attribute convention.

spz_sidecar.description: True if provenance ships in the *.astl.json sidecar for bare .spz/.sog exports (the splat file itself stays standard).
